description: arXiv:2607.10208v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate meteorological forecasting is essential for agricultural planning, irrigation management, and environmental decision support. This study conducts a comparative evaluation of recurrent and hybrid deep learning architectures for multivariate forecasting of reference evapotranspiration ($ET_0$), vapour pressure deficit (VPD), wind speed, a...
author: Piotr Sikora, Sotirios Kontogiannis
